/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/assetLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/meshGenerating.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/meshProcessing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/renderenginev2.dir/src_files/raytracer.cpp.o -o renderenginev2   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib
